prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约13168→13371→10592→36092→21736，2024年因贵州省首次新高考出现位次异常跳升（36092），2025年回落至21736；近两年波动剧烈，2025年基准约21736名；本省物理类计划2021年101人、2022年107人、2023年111人、2024年113人、2025年114人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划仅33人，较2025年大幅缩招约71%，竞争压力显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第89名（2025年第84名、2024年第92名），近年排名在84–92之间波动，属中游211；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第83位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平，报考关注度不高；交通运输工程A-（第五轮学科评估），为长安大学唯一A-及以上学科，与道路桥梁、交通工程等招生专业直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 土木建筑类社会热度"明显劝退"，材料类"明显劝退"，机械类"分化观望"；计算机类、电子信息类"高热推荐"但该校相关专业招生极少；本省2026年考生总数约299000人（较2025年297258人略增），物理类按历史占比估算约20.8万人，竞争略有加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批387分、特殊类型483分，与2024年基本持平；长安大学位于陕西西安，在贵州省招生占比约1.5%（2025年9人/全国598人），非本省高校，无地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次21736名、2026年大幅缩招（计划从114人降至33人）使位次显著前移、本省考生总数略增及传统工科热度偏低等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次约12671名，区间12171–13171名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13168 → 13371 → 10592 → 36092 → 21736. In 2024, due to Guizhou's first new college entrance examination, there was an abnormal ranking jump (36092), which fell back to 21736 in 2025; fluctuations have been severe in recent two years, with a baseline of about 21736 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 101 in 2021, 107 in 2022, 111 in 2023, 113 in 2024, and 114 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion. The 2026 plan is only 33, a significant reduction of about 71% compared to 2025, greatly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, about 89th in 2026 (84th in 2025, 92nd in 2024), with recent rankings fluctuating between 84 and 92, belonging to mid-tier 211. Recent reputation is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd (rated 'average'), with short video exposure at a medium-low level, indicating low application attention. Transportation Engineering is A- (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at Chang'an University, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Road and Bridge, Transportation Engineering, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Civil and construction majors have a social popularity of 'clearly discouraged', materials majors 'clearly discouraged', mechanical majors 'divided and wait-and-see'. Computer and electronic information majors are 'highly recommended' but the university has very few enrollment spots in related majors. The province's total number of candidates in 2026 is about 299,000 (slightly up from 297,258 in 2025), with Physics Category estimated at about 208,000 based on historical proportion, competition slightly intensifying. The provincial control line for Physics Category in 2025 was 387 for undergraduate batch and 483 for special type, basically flat with 2024. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, with an enrollment share in Guizhou of about 1.5% (9 out of 598 nationally in 2025), not a local university, with no regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 21736, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (plan dropping from 114 to 33) causing a notable forward shift in ranking, a slight increase in provincial candidate numbers, and low popularity of traditional engineering majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 12671, with a range of 12171–13171.

Candidates within the predicted ranking range can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors like Computer/Electronic Information/Electrical, with Tier 2 advantageous disciplines like Transportation/Vehicle Engineering as main choices, and Tier 3 Civil/Materials/Architecture as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 12171) can boldly aim for Tier 1 flagship majors.
